scripts.dev: concurrently "corepack pnpm --filter server dev" "corepack pnpm --filter passenger dev" "corepack pnpm --filter dispatcher dev" "corepack pnpm --filter driver dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter server build && corepack pnpm --filter passenger build && corepack pnpm --filter dispatcher build && corepack pnpm --filter driver build
scripts.start: concurrently "corepack pnpm --filter server start" "corepack pnpm --filter passenger preview" "corepack pnpm --filter dispatcher preview" "corepack pnpm --filter driver preview"
